novel_features.name: Reverse ability search
novel_features.description: Find every Pokémon with a given ability. Live API has no reverse index — this is a single SQL query against the local store.

novel_features.name: Reverse move-effect search
novel_features.description: Find moves by status effect, damage class, type, or target — e.g. all moves that paralyze a Steel-type.

novel_features.name: Team partner suggester
novel_features.description: Given an in-progress team, score every remaining Pokémon by how well it covers the team's typing gaps. Returns top candidates.

novel_features.name: Move-learnset diff between forms
novel_features.description: Compare the move learnsets of two Pokémon (often regional forms or megas) and surface what each can learn that the other cannot.

novel_features.name: Cross-generation Pokémon timeline
novel_features.description: Show how a Pokémon has changed over generations: type changes, stat changes, ability changes, and which generation it was introduced in.

novel_features.name: Regional-form comparator
novel_features.description: List every form for a species (e.g. Vulpix vs Alolan Vulpix) with type, stat, and ability deltas inline.

novel_features.name: Evolution-requirement reverse lookup
novel_features.description: Given a target Pokémon, surface the species you would need to evolve and the conditions (item, level, friendship, time of day) to get there.

novel_features.name: Coverage-gap finder
novel_features.description: List which of the 18 types your in-progress team has neither defensive resistance nor offensive super-effectiveness against.

novel_features.name: Local FTS search
novel_features.description: Full-text search across Pokémon, moves, abilities, items, and locations — names plus flavor text — with relevance ranking.

novel_features.name: SQL passthrough
novel_features.description: Read-only SQL access to the local store. Power users and agents can compose joins the CLI doesn't expose directly.

novel_features.name: Region encounter map
novel_features.description: Render a region-level encounter table joining locations, areas, encounters, and species — every Pokémon you can find in (e.g.) Kanto.

novel_features.name: Damage calculator
novel_features.description: Compute expected damage range for a move from one Pokémon to another, factoring in STAB, type effectiveness, level, and base stats.

novel_features.name: Stat ranker
novel_features.description: Rank Pokémon by a base stat (attack, special-attack, speed, hp, etc.), optionally filtered by type. Returns the top N.

description: Fully offline Pokédex with SQL, full-text search, type math, and a damage calculator no other Pokémon tool ships as a CLI.
